description: User-validated slide boundary fixture for SpeechPT mid-presentation generalization check.
manual_notes: User noted that the manually reviewed boundaries may have about 1-2 seconds of error.
Manual segments intentionally preserve small overlaps/gaps from human listening review.
Around 164s there is a pause, but the content still belongs to the solution/AE explanation; true progress-status cue starts closer to 174s.
observed_error_pattern: S1/S2 boundary is too late because the cover anchor absorbs the beginning of team introduction.
S5/S6 boundary is too early because a pause at 164.09s is treated like a slide transition even though the progress-status cue appears later.
S7/S8 boundary is close to the manual reference.
